syncai: Sync Granola notes and meeting short entries using AI
capthe: Limit the number of synced records. Leave blank to sync all records.
scopeth: Sync one folder and all its subfolders at once. Leave the field blank to sync records in all folders.
onlysyn: Sync only notes created on or after this date (ISO 8601). Leave the field blank to sync all notes regardless of creation date.
maxnote: Maximum number of records must be a non-negative number.
synccha: Synchronize channel messages from Microsoft Teams
eggen: for example, General, Announced (separated by commas for multiple)
atleast: At least one channel must be selected.
eg1ab: For example: 1aVGd…, 2vSZhKi… (separated by commas for multiple)
synccms: CMS collection elements synchronized with the web development site in Webflow. Note: OAuth tokens for Webflow do not support updates — may require periodic reinstallation of the connection.
maxitem: The maximum number of products should be a positive number.
accessd: Access denied. Check your permissions in Webflow.
syncboa: Sync board and update elements to your knowledge base.
boardst: Sync boards. Leave blank to sync elements from all active boards you have access to.
synctex: Sync text objects from Amazon S3 or any storage compatible with S3 (e.g., Cloudflare R2, MinIO) into your knowledge base.
s3compa: Endpoint for compatibility with S3 by Cloudflare R2, MinIO and others. Leave empty for AWS S3. Uses path-style addressing. Simple http:// is only allowed for localhost.
stopsyn: After this many objects, stop syncing
wrongre: Incorrect region for this container. Update the region to match that of the container (or use
thedisc: Discord channel ID for message synchronization
invalid: Invalid bot token or missing permissions for this channel
syncmee: Sync Google Meet transcripts to your knowledge base.
syncenv: Shell and metadata synchronization from DocuSign into your knowledge base.
oniniti: Only on first sync. Filters envelopes by the date of their last status change (from_date).
synccan: Sync candidate activity and interview evaluation tables from Greenhouse.
synconl: Sync only candidates who submitted a request for this vacancy in this green house. Leave blank to sync candidates from all vacancies.
syncrep: Synchronize repository files, wiki pages and project issues from GitLab to your knowledge base.
selfman: User-managed GitLab host. Leave blank for gitlab.com.
brancho: Branch or tag for repository synchronization. Applies only during code synchronization.
whichis: Which tasks to synchronize by state. Applies only during task synchronization.
hostmus: The host must be a valid GitLab domain (e.g., gitlab.example.com)
thewiki: Wiki functionality is disabled for this project.
syncpos: Sync site WordPress.com entries and pages. OAuth tokens expire around 2 weeks (no update token).
maxpost: Maximum number of posts must be a positive number.
leaveem: Leave blank for syncing all notebooks
maxfile: The maximum number of files must be a positive number.
theprov: The specified path is not a folder.
syncinc: Synchronize incidents and post-matters from incident.io into your knowledge base.
maxresp: Maximum number of responses on the form
caponr: Limit on the number of indexed responses per form. Applies only during indexing.
question: Questions and Responses
maxform: The maximum number of forms must be a positive number
egdef: Of course! Please provide the text to translate.
noteams: No teams — make sure the OAuth token has read permissions.
synchel: Sync articles and conversations from Help Center Intercom
syncfor: Sync responses from Typeform form to your knowledge base
thetype: Typeform form responses you want to synchronize.
whichre: Which responses to sync based on completion status. Defaults to only completed ones.
customw: WIQL User query request in WIT language
syncwik: Sync wiki pages, work items, and repository files from your Azure DevOps project into your knowledge base.
restrict: Limit synchronization to only one wiki by name or ID. Applies only during page sync in a wiki.
advanced: Advanced: Full WIQL request selecting [System.Id]. Replaces filter types, status, area path, and tags when set. Custom queries are always full lists on each sync (date change filter is not applied).
syncvid: Sync videos from YouTube channel or playlist into your knowledge base.
ayoutub: Please provide a YouTube API key
provide: Provide the channel ID or playlist ID.
syncpag: Sync pages from your Notion workspace.
pageid: Page ID required under the condition that the scope of application is present
pasteve: Events in the past only (last 30 days)
futuree: Actions in the future only (next 30 days)
extended: Expanded range (90 days in each direction)
egpri: For example, main, team@group.calendar.google.com (separated by commas for multiple items)
egsta: for example, standup, sprint preview (not required)
syncrec: Synchronize records from the Airtable table.
baseid: A basic identifier and table name are required.
egeng: Example, Project(s) separated by comma for multiple projects.
domaina: A domain and at least one project key are required.
syncfil: Sync files from a GitHub repository
whatcon: What content to synchronize from Zendesk
syncsub: Subreddit posts and comments synchronization in subreddits
subreddi: Subreddit name for post synchronization (without prefix r/)
egmac:
Yes, here is the translation:

"Example: machine_learning"
egdo: For example /Documents (default: all of your Dropbox)
couldno: Could not resolve URL of Salesforce instance.
synckno: Sync Knowledge Base articles and incidents from ServiceNow
filterk: Filter knowledge base articles by workflow status.
hostof: Sentry host. Leave empty for sentry.io. Set this for a local Sentry installation (e.g., sentry.mycompany.com).
sentrys: Sentry search query to filter issues (for example,
timewin: The time range over which Sentry calculates statistics on task state statuses in the list of tasks.
syncser: Sync support requests from Jira Service Management into your knowledge base.
comments: Comments require an additional API call per request during sync.
maxcall: The maximum number of calls must be a non-negative number.
maxtask: The maximum number of tasks must be a positive number.
whichpo: Which posts to sync into the knowledge base
oneorm: One or more usernames for syncing posts (separated by commas). Used only in 'X' synchronization mode.
oldestp: Publication time of the oldest post (ISO 8601 UTC). Applies to posts and mentions; ignored for bookmarks and likes.
newestp: Last post publication time (ISO 8601 UTC). Applies to posts and mentions; ignored for bookmarks and likes.
livesyn: Real-time synchronization requires a plan of Max or Enterprise.
oauthcr: OAuth data not found. Please reconfigure the connector.
